case_title: ANGULO MAURICIO SANDOVAL VS THE HANFORD/HEALY COMPANIES

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT THE HANFORD/HEALY COMPANIES
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY ANGULO MAURICIO SANDOVAL AS TO DEFENDANT THE HANFORD/HEALY COMPANIES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-03-1994 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT 01
